{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Senator Griffiss
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Senator Griffiss]] is a senator being challenged by [[Varic]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30">''The Knight'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
